title: Right to Equality (Article 14)
description: Ensures equality before the law and equal protection of the laws within the territory of India.

case.name: Indira Sawhney vs Union of India (1992)
case.summary: The Supreme Court upheld 27% reservation for OBCs and defined the concept of 'creamy layer', balancing equality and social justice.

title: Right to Information Act, 2005
description: Empowers citizens to seek information from public authorities to promote transparency and accountability.

case.name: CBSE vs Aditya Bandopadhyay (2011)
case.summary: The Supreme Court ruled that students can seek their evaluated answer sheets under the RTI Act.
